title: vulpia stipoides subsp. letourneuxii
intro: Vulpia stipoides subsp. letourneuxii, also known as slender false brome, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The slender false brome has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Vulpia stipoides subsp. letourneuxii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
